modality: humanized IgG / IgG4 or Fc-reduced anti-PVRIG
mechanism_success_signal: binds PVRIG ECD; blocks PVRIG-PVRL2; activates CTL/NK axis; clinical signals in ovarian combinations/maintenance setting
epitope_or_residue_signal: CPA.7.021 group linked to R95/I97 by cyno-to-human mapping; R95 overlaps current consensus interface
modeling_use: positive control; CDR leakage exclusion; blocking assay benchmark; R95 soft hotspot support
caveat: do not copy sequence; COM701 sequence/version should not be assumed from public web pages unless verified
primary_sources: NCI COM701; Compugen COM701 page; EP3258951B1

mechanism_success_signal: distinct PVRIG epitope; blocks CD112 interaction; promotes NK and T cell activation preclinically
epitope_or_residue_signal: distinct epitope claimed, exact residues not found in public summary
modeling_use: distinct-epitope allowance; do not overfit to Tab5/HR-151 epitope
caveat: commercial/clinical outcome not treated as proven efficacy here; mechanism evidence is preclinical/public summary level

modality: humanized IgG1 anti-PVRIG with Fc-competent function
mechanism_success_signal: human PVRIG Kd 0.53 nM; PVRIG-PVRL2 blocking IC50 0.94 nM; cynoPVRIG Kd 2.71 nM; NK activation and Fc engagement required for strong in vivo efficacy
epitope_or_residue_signal: binds PVRIG ECD; public paper emphasizes Fc/NK mechanism more than residue-level epitope
modeling_use: separate blocking score from Fc/NK function; add format-aware scoring for future VHH-Fc
caveat: not a VHH; residue epitope unavailable in public paper summary
primary_sources: Xue et al. 2024 Cancer Immunology Immunotherapy

modality: VHH / single-domain antibodies; IgG4 Fc fusions; TIGIT-PVRIG bispecifics
evidence_level: patent assay evidence + official positive reference for HR-151
mechanism_success_signal: VHHs show nM/sub-nM PVRIG binding and nM-level PVRIG-PVRL2 blocking; 151 has strong blocking IC50 in patent
epitope_or_residue_signal: exact residue epitope not public in patent text; functional blocking implies interface competition
modeling_use: VHH scaffold/design reference; positive leakage exclusion; include 20/30/38/39 diversity not just 151
caveat: 151 single-agent was not clearly sufficient in one xenograft model; double antibody/combination context mattered

modality: anti-TIGIT antibody fused with anti-PVRIG nanobody arm
mechanism_success_signal: blocks TIGIT/CD155 and PVRIG/CD112; T cell activation increased 2.8-fold; NK cytotoxicity increased 1.8-fold; antitumor activity in models; no DLT at 200 mg/kg repeated cyno dosing
epitope_or_residue_signal: uses PVRIG-30 nanobody arm; exact residue epitope not public in abstract
modeling_use: future format-aware ranking; nanobody fusion compatibility; TIGIT/PVRIG co-blocking label
caveat: format-specific result; not direct proof that naked PVRIG-30 VHH alone is optimal

modality: anti-TIGIT/anti-PVRIG bispecific antibodies; scFv or IgG1-based bispecific format
mechanism_success_signal: simultaneously inhibits TIGIT and PVRIG, biases CD112/CD155 signaling toward CD226 activation; SIM0348 includes Fc-mediated Treg killing concept
epitope_or_residue_signal: no residue-level epitope in NCI entries
modeling_use: DNAM-axis co-blocking concept; future multi-specific format strategy
caveat: drug dictionary is mechanism summary, not detailed structure/affinity evidence

modality: engineered receptor ECD / soluble CD112 trap / CAR-TCE module
mechanism_success_signal: 9E6Y-like CD112-CD112R structure guided directed evolution; high-affinity CD112R variant blocks CD112-CD112R and improves CD112+ tumor killing in engineered formats
epitope_or_residue_signal: remodels CD112-CD112R interface rather than antibody epitope
modeling_use: supports interface residue prioritization, affinity tuning, and structure-guided mutational search
caveat: not anti-PVRIG antibody; targets ligand side/engineered receptor strategy

molecule_or_family: anti-mouse/human PVRIG blocking mAbs in NK studies
mechanism_success_signal: PVRIG blockade slows tumor growth; NK and CD8 cells contribute; blockade works in NK/PBMC-reconstituted human xenografts
epitope_or_residue_signal: no residue-level epitope; mechanism validates PVRIG-PVRL2 blockade output
modeling_use: add NK activation and tumor-context labels; do not model only CD8 T cell rescue
caveat: research clones not direct development candidates
primary_sources: Li et al. 2021 Journal of Hematology & Oncology
